name: Wafrah for Industry and Development Company
summary: Wafrah for Industry and Development Company engages in manufacturing, canning, preserving, processing, and marketing food products in Saudi Arabia and internationally. It provides pasta products, potato chips, frozen French fries products, peanut products, and breakfast cereals, as well as frozen, chilled, and cooked meat products. The company markets its products under the Wafra, Caprini, Saudi Garden, and Nemah brands. It is also involved in the treatment and processing of agricultural products; and investment in land property. The company was formerly known as Food Products Company and changed its name to Wafrah for Industry and Development Company in 2014. Wafrah for Industry and Development Company was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia.
